title: ScoutReport
description: Grounding pass over the actual tree. Everything downstream builds on this; paraphrase without evidence is worthless here.

subject.description: One sentence: what was scouted and why.

role.description: Why this file matters to the task (one sentence).

key_symbols.description: Functions/types downstream steps will need by name.

claim.description: What the code currently does (present tense, falsifiable).

evidence.description: path:line, command output, or test name that demonstrates it. Not 'the docs say'.

would_falsify.description: The observation that would kill this hypothesis — a hypothesis without one is a hunch.

root_cause_hypotheses.description: Only for bug-shaped work; ranked, strongest first.

constraints.description: Invariants the fix must not break (single-recorder seams, replay determinism, wire compat...), each with a path reference.

prior_art.description: Existing patterns in-tree the design should match (path + one line).

not_covered.description: Directories not read, behaviors not exercised, claims taken on faith.
